# boiseparks.com

> An independent, ad-free guide to all 94 City of Boise parks, written for parents of young
> children. Every park is documented with playground equipment and age range, restroom
> season (heated year-round vs. winterized), tree-cover shade rating, parking and a
> transparent 0-10 Parent Score. Facts come from City of Boise open GIS data and Boise
> Parks and Recreation pages; the site is not affiliated with the City of Boise.

Key figures across the 94 parks: 57 have playgrounds, 8 have splash pads,
fountains or misters, 3 contain city outdoor pools, 24 have heated restrooms open
year-round, 29 keep a portable toilet once the building is winterized, and 46
are rated leafy for dense mature tree cover.

Data last refreshed from city sources: July 2026. Page data regenerated: 2026-07-20.

## Guides

- [Splash pads and fountains](https://boiseparks.com/splash-pads/): All 8 water features grouped by type (ground-jet splash pads, interactive fountains, misting stations) plus the 3 outdoor pools, with hours, restroom status and shade for each.
- [Park restrooms open in winter](https://boiseparks.com/restrooms/): Which of the 94 parks have restrooms available in the cold months — 24 heated year-round, 29 with a winter portable toilet — grouped by area.
- [Playgrounds ranked](https://boiseparks.com/best-playgrounds/): All 57 playgrounds scored on equipment and age range, tree cover, open grass and restrooms, with shortlists for toddler equipment, shade and year-round restrooms.

## Reference

- [Homepage and interactive map](https://boiseparks.com/): Filterable map and list of all 94 parks, plus methodology for the shade rating and Parent Score.
- [Park data as JSON](https://boiseparks.com/data/parks.json): The underlying dataset — amenities, playground details, restroom season, tree counts and coordinates for every park.

## Parks

- [Aldape Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/aldape-park/): 0.4 acres in North River; no playground, no restrooms at this park, leafy shade; Parent Score 4/10.
- [Ann Morrison Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/ann-morrison-park/): 148.1 acres in North River; playground, interactive fountain, heated restrooms, open year-round, some shade shade; Parent Score 8.3/10.
- [Baggley Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/baggley-park/): 7.5 acres in Southeast; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 8.3/10.
- [Barber Observation Point](https://boiseparks.com/parks/barber-observation-point/): 2.2 acres in Southeast; no playground, no restrooms at this park, some shade shade; Parent Score 1.3/10.
- [Bernardine Quinn Riverside Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/bernardine-quinn-riverside-park/): 31.2 acres in North River; no playground, no restrooms at this park, mostly full sun shade; Parent Score 0.5/10.
- [Boise Hills Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/boise-hills-park/): 7.3 acres in North River; playground, no restrooms at this park, some shade shade; Parent Score 4.5/10.
- [Borah Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/borah-park/): 11.4 acres in Central Bench; playground, spray pad, outdoor pool, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, some shade shade; Parent Score 7/10.
- [Bowden Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/bowden-park/): 2.7 acres in Central Bench; playground, seasonal restrooms (closed in winter), leafy shade; Parent Score 7.8/10.
- [Bowler Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/bowler-park/): 24.6 acres in Southeast; playground, misters, heated restrooms, open year-round, mostly full sun shade; Parent Score 6/10.
- [C.W. Moore Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/c-w-moore-park/): 0.3 acres in North River; no playground, heated restrooms, open year-round, leafy shade; Parent Score 4/10.
- [Camel's Back Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/camels-back-park/): 11.3 acres in North River; playground, heated restrooms, open year-round, leafy shade; Parent Score 9/10.
- [Camel's Back Reserve](https://boiseparks.com/parks/camels-back-reserve/): 63.1 acres in North River; no playground, no restrooms at this park, mostly full sun shade; Parent Score 0/10.
- [Cassia Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/cassia-park/): 12.5 acres in Central Bench; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 9/10.
- [Castle Hills Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/castle-hills-park/): 7.1 acres in North River; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 9/10.
- [Catalpa Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/catalpa-park/): 5.5 acres in North River; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 8/10.
- [Cecil D. Andrus Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/cecil-d-andrus-park/): 1.9 acres in North River; no playground, no restrooms at this park, leafy shade; Parent Score 2.5/10.
- [Charles F. McDevitt Youth Sports Complex](https://boiseparks.com/parks/charles-f-mcdevitt-youth-sports-complex/): 38.7 acres in West Bench; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, some shade shade; Parent Score 7.3/10.
- [Cherie Buckner-Webb Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/cherie-buckner-webb-park/): 0.6 acres in Downtown; no playground, heated restrooms, open year-round, leafy shade; Parent Score 4/10.
- [Comba Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/comba-park/): 3.4 acres in West Bench; playground, splash pad, no restrooms at this park, leafy shade; Parent Score 6.3/10.
- [Cottonwood Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/cottonwood-park/): 8.1 acres in West Bench; playground, heated restrooms, open year-round, some shade shade; Parent Score 7.5/10.
- [Cypress Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/cypress-park/): 7.3 acres in Southeast; playground, seasonal restrooms (closed in winter), leafy shade; Parent Score 7.8/10.

- [Eagle Rock Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/eagle-rock-park/): 8.9 acres in North River; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 8/10.
- [Elm Grove Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/elm-grove-park/): 4.2 acres in North River; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 7.8/10.
- [Esther Simplot Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/esther-simplot-park/): 56 acres in North River; playground, heated restrooms, open year-round, some shade shade; Parent Score 8/10.
- [Fairmont Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/fairmont-park/): 4.2 acres in West Bench; playground, outdoor pool, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 7/10.
- [Fairview Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/fairview-park/): 2.3 acres in North River; playground, misters, seasonal restrooms (closed in winter), leafy shade; Parent Score 7.5/10.
- [Florence Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/florence-park/): 3.5 acres in West Bench; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, leafy shade; Parent Score 7.5/10.
- [Foothills East Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/foothills-east-park/): 8.4 acres in North River; no playground, no restrooms at this park, some shade shade; Parent Score 2.8/10.

- [Franklin Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/franklin-park/): 2.9 acres in Central Bench; playground, misters, heated restrooms, open year-round, some shade shade; Parent Score 8.8/10.
- [Gordon S. Bowen Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/gordon-s-bowen-park/): 0.3 acres in North River; playground, no restrooms at this park, leafy shade; Parent Score 5/10.
- [Grove Plaza](https://boiseparks.com/parks/grove-plaza/): 1.3 acres in Downtown; no playground, interactive fountain, no restrooms at this park, leafy shade; Parent Score 3/10.
- [Helen B. Lowder Park](https://boiseparks.com/parks/helen-b-lowder-park/): 5.1 acres in Southeast; playground, seasonal restrooms; portable toilet in winter, some shade shade; Parent Score 6.8/10.
